Applying to 11111011
Input
0 1
1 1
2 1
3 1
4 1
5 0
6 1
7 1
Output
0 XNOR51 = XNOR(0,1) = 0
1 XNOR62 = XNOR(1,1) = 1
2 XNOR73 = XNOR(1,1) = 1
3 NOT4 = NOT(1) = 0
4 NOT5 = NOT(0) = 1
5 NOT6 = NOT(1) = 0
6 OR-NOT07 = OR(1,NOT(1)) = 1
7 OR-NOT10 = OR(1,NOT(1)) = 1
